meta.title: Merai — AI-powered video editing studio
meta.description: Upload raw footage and let Merai do the editing: accurate Arabic transcription, silence and filler removal, and publish-ready captions.

landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your raw recording and Merai handles the rest: accurate Arabic-first transcription, automatic silence, filler and retake removal, and publish-ready captions for every platform.
landing.feature1Body: High-accuracy speech-to-text in Modern Standard Arabic, with tolerance for Levantine, Gulf and Egyptian dialects.
landing.feature2Body: Silence, filler words and weak takes are removed automatically — the best take wins when you re-record a line.
landing.feature3Body: Change the transcript and the video re-cuts itself — review and approve, no complex timeline required.

auth.checkEmail: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Open it to activate your account.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.confirmError: We couldn't confirm your email. Try logging in or request a new link.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyBody: Coming soon: upload your first raw video and Merai will handle the edit, from transcript to export.
